possible_metric: Number of notable or frontier-relevant AI models produced by in-country institutions
missingness_policy: mark missing when source lacks country-year value
notes: Keep separate from adoption and outcomes

possible_metric: Relative benchmark gap between domestic models and frontier models
normalization: benchmark-specific; no cross-benchmark averaging in V0
missingness_policy: mark missing if benchmark or country model set is not documented
notes: Use cautiously because benchmarks are domain-specific and unstable

possible_metric: Availability of compliant frontier GPUs and packaging for domestic actors
missingness_policy: mark missing where only rumor or unsourced claims exist
notes: Separate chip access from power and data-center readiness

concept: Public or subsidized AI compute capacity
possible_metric: Government-supported compute capacity available to firms researchers or agencies
normalization: per researcher or per GDP only after source review
missingness_policy: mark official targets separately from delivered capacity
notes: Values are often official program claims

possible_metric: Availability of domestic allied or global cloud and model suppliers to firms and agencies
missingness_policy: mark missing unless supplier access is documented
qualitative_coding: Requires explicit coding rubric for domestic allied and foreign-access channels
notes: Do not infer from GDP or general internet access

possible_metric: Operational high-density data-center IT or electric load suitable for AI workloads
normalization: MW and MW per GDP as exploratory views
missingness_policy: mark announced but not energized capacity separately
notes: Measures deployable load not paper announcements

possible_metric: Contracted queued or requested large-load capacity divided by operational energized load
missingness_policy: mark missing when operational load or contracted pipeline is unavailable
notes: High ratio indicates bottleneck risk or speculative queue

possible_metric: Median time from interconnection request to commercial operation
normalization: years; use regional distribution not just national median
missingness_policy: mark missing outside jurisdictions without comparable series
notes: Generation interconnection is a proxy for broader grid throughput

possible_metric: Large-load connection requests relative to system peak load
normalization: GW and ratio to peak load
missingness_policy: mark missing when queue categories are not disclosed
notes: Especially useful for ERCOT and PJM-style load pockets

possible_metric: Share of expected AI load backed by dispatchable or hourly matched supply
normalization: percent of expected load where documented
missingness_policy: mark missing when only annual renewable claims are available
qualitative_coding: Requires source-backed distinction between annual green claims and hourly deliverability
notes: Do not count annual PPAs as firm power without evidence

possible_metric: Data center or compute-center electricity use as share of national or regional electricity consumption
missingness_policy: mark missing where compute-center definition is unclear
notes: High share can signal scale or bottleneck exposure

possible_metric: Direct and indirect water burden plus liquid-cooling readiness for high-density racks
missingness_policy: mark missing if water or cooling evidence is not local
qualitative_coding: Requires separate coding for water burden and cooling capability
notes: National averages can hide local constraints

possible_metric: Ability to match workload class to data-center geography and latency envelope
missingness_policy: mark missing unless workload class and latency logic are documented
qualitative_coding: Code remote batch and latency-sensitive inference separately
notes: Useful for East Data West Computing and Watt-Bit comparisons

possible_metric: Installed industrial robots per 10000 manufacturing workers
missingness_policy: mark missing where IFR does not report country-year
notes: Hard anchor for manufacturing automation stock

possible_metric: Annual industrial robot installations
normalization: count; compare with manufacturing value added where needed
missingness_policy: mark missing where source lacks country-year value
notes: Tracks current automation investment flow

possible_metric: Operational stock of industrial robots
missingness_policy: mark missing where source lacks country-year value
notes: Use alongside density to separate scale and intensity

possible_metric: Share of manufacturing enterprises using AI technologies
normalization: percent of firms with 10+ employees where comparable
missingness_policy: mark missing where manufacturing sector cannot be isolated
notes: Definitions vary; never compare without survey metadata

possible_metric: Share of firms using at least one AI technology
normalization: percent of firms; keep size and sector breakouts
missingness_policy: mark missing where survey frames differ too much
notes: Extensive-margin adoption only; not intensity

possible_metric: Share of firms reporting intensive or significant AI use
normalization: percent of firms within source survey
missingness_policy: mark missing where only nominal adoption exists
notes: Needed to avoid overcounting shallow adoption

possible_metric: Difference between large-firm and small-firm AI adoption rates
missingness_policy: mark missing if firm-size classes differ irreconcilably
notes: Core distribution-quality indicator

possible_metric: Difference or ratio between highest-sector and median or lowest-sector AI adoption
missingness_policy: mark missing if sector taxonomy not comparable
notes: Highlights concentration in ICT and professional services

possible_metric: Penetration of cloud ERP CRM cybersecurity data governance or IoT among firms
normalization: separate components preferred over composite in V0
missingness_policy: mark missing for components without source values
notes: Input complement not realized AI outcome

possible_metric: Share of business functions performed at advanced AI-enabled level
normalization: no V0 numeric score without survey design
missingness_policy: mark missing until fielded or sourced at task level
qualitative_coding: Requires custom survey or task-level adoption module
notes: More informative than yes/no adoption but currently data sparse

possible_metric: Count or share of factories certified or documented as smart factories by maturity level
missingness_policy: mark official counts as official-claim and keep maturity definitions separate
notes: Policy categories are not directly comparable

possible_metric: Adoption or participation in ISO 23247 AAS OPC UA Catena-X or similar industrial data standards
missingness_policy: mark missing without direct standards evidence
qualitative_coding: Requires explicit standards basket and source-backed coding
notes: Important middle-layer proxy for manufacturing conversion

possible_metric: Time from AI proof of concept to plant-wide agency-wide or supply-chain deployment
missingness_policy: mark missing without documented start and scale dates
notes: Use as case evidence until survey series exists

possible_metric: Density or capacity of integrators maintenance technicians service networks and OT cybersecurity support
missingness_policy: mark missing unless directly observed or defensibly proxied
qualitative_coding: Requires proxy basket; do not infer from robot stock alone
notes: Key missing middle-layer variable

possible_metric: Manufacturing labor productivity or value added per worker
normalization: constant currency or indexed time series
missingness_policy: mark missing if not sector-comparable
notes: Outcome control; AI attribution must be separate

possible_metric: Defect rate scrap rate OEE downtime cycle time or equipment utilization improvement
normalization: case-specific; no country score in V0
missingness_policy: mark missing without baseline and measurement method
notes: Often official or vendor case evidence; validate before promotion

possible_metric: Quality-sensitive manufacturing exports or industrial competitiveness measures
missingness_policy: mark missing where AI attribution is unsupported
notes: Outcome-side comparator not AI-specific

possible_metric: Existence and maturity of AI procurement memos playbooks or buying channels
missingness_policy: mark missing where no official procurement pathway is documented
qualitative_coding: Requires coding of policy maturity not numeric performance
notes: Separate procurement readiness from actual public-sector ROI

possible_metric: Share of agencies or functions using AI operationally in service delivery decision support or back office
missingness_policy: mark missing where only pilot lists or strategies exist
notes: Promising but data sparse and often official

possible_metric: Population or user base reachable through public digital platforms before AI insertion
normalization: per capita and transaction intensity where sourced
missingness_policy: mark official platform counts as official claims unless independently verified
notes: Enabling channel; not itself AI outcome

possible_metric: Documented cost time error or service-quality improvement from AI deployment in public agencies
missingness_policy: mark missing without baseline and counterfactual or at least before-after detail
notes: Nearly all countries lack standardized cross-agency ROI data

possible_metric: Share of workers receiving AI training using AI weekly or entering AI deployment occupations
normalization: percent of workforce and program counts kept separate
missingness_policy: mark official program targets separately from completions
notes: Distinguish elite AI talent from mass implementation skills

possible_metric: Adult training participation overall and for older or at-risk workers
missingness_policy: mark missing where age or risk group unavailable
notes: General adaptation capacity not AI-specific

possible_metric: Share of employment in occupations exposed to generative AI
normalization: percent of employment by exposure band
missingness_policy: mark missing if occupation mapping is unavailable
notes: Exposure is not displacement; pair with buffering indicators

possible_metric: Difference in high AI exposure by gender region or metro status
missingness_policy: mark missing without demographic or regional breakout
notes: Distributional risk indicator

possible_metric: Coverage adequacy portability and shock responsiveness of social protection for AI-exposed workers
missingness_policy: mark missing where social-protection data cannot be tied to worker groups
notes: General safety-net indicator not AI-specific

possible_metric: Willingness to trust AI acceptance of AI use and perceived sufficiency of safeguards
normalization: separate trust and acceptance; do not collapse in V0
missingness_policy: mark missing if survey mode or sample is not documented
notes: Acceptance and trust must remain separate

concept: Concern versus excitement and regulatory adequacy
possible_metric: Public concern excitement and views on whether current laws are sufficient
normalization: separate items not composite in V0
missingness_policy: mark missing where question wording differs too much
notes: Use as legitimacy signal not adoption predictor

possible_metric: Presence of complaint explanation opt-out audit logging regulator notification and enforcement channels
missingness_policy: mark missing where legal right exists but enforcement mechanism is unclear
qualitative_coding: Code legal remedies separately from political trust
notes: Separates rights-centered and state-supervised models

possible_metric: Real wages employment transitions job quality service access or inequality changes in AI-exposed groups
missingness_policy: mark missing unless outcome and AI exposure are both sourced
notes: Core outcome but hard to attribute

possible_metric: Public research compute open data AI tooling and interdisciplinary AI-for-science centers
missingness_policy: mark missing without direct research-system evidence
qualitative_coding: Better than AI paper count alone but requires custom coding
notes: Keep readiness separate from discovery outcomes

possible_metric: AI-assisted discovery proxies such as citation-weighted AI-for-science papers experiment throughput or time-to-result
normalization: no V0 composite without field normalization
missingness_policy: mark missing where source only counts AI papers not AI-for-science outcomes
notes: Data sparse and field-normalization sensitive

possible_metric: Time from prototype to fielding number of operational AI systems operator trust or decision-cycle compression
missingness_policy: mark missing unless openly documented systems budgets or doctrine support value
qualitative_coding: Requires low-confidence label; much evidence is classified
notes: Keep security frontier sensitivity separate from civilian conversion

possible_metric: Ratio or qualitative comparison between frontier innovation inputs and diffusion capacity
normalization: no numeric ratio in V0 without documented formula
missingness_policy: mark missing until denominator and numerator are sourced
notes: Useful diagnostic but not a headline score

possible_metric: Observed outcome improvement per unit of AI capability spend compute or adoption input
normalization: no V0 scoring; show only where numerator and denominator are sourced
missingness_policy: mark missing unless both outcome and input are sourced and lag specified
notes: This is the long-run differentiator but not ready for V0 headline use

possible_metric: Share of AI adoption or support reaching SMEs lagging regions suppliers or non-metropolitan areas
missingness_policy: mark missing if only national aggregate adoption is available
notes: Distribution quality should not be inferred from national adoption alone

possible_metric: Employment wage hours informality safety or job-quality changes among AI or robotics-exposed workers
missingness_policy: mark missing unless exposure and outcome are both documented
notes: Do not equate exposure with displacement
